documents.topic: Eliminate UnsafeMutablePointer<Entry> from io_uring Submission Queue Entry preparation API. Restore @inlinable using ~Copyable ~Escapable slot types. Lifetimes and LifetimeDependence enabled in package. v2.0.0 DECISION.

Build-blocking visibility issue: @inlinable public Prepare methods reference internal io_uring_sqe C struct from CLinuxKernelShim, blocked under InternalImportsByDefault. Affects ~60 Prepare methods. Resolved 2026-04-11.
documents.statusDetail: Resolved 2026-04-11; build-blocking severity at issue time. statusRaw uses non-canonical lowercase 'resolved' — mapped to canonical DECISION.

documents.topic: Pattern doc: replace `take()` consuming methods on source types with consuming init on the TARGET type (e.g., Kernel.Descriptor(consume eventDescriptor) replaces eventDescriptor.take()). Established during io_uring refactor.
